description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, angular surface and a predominantly brownish-gray coloration. The rock features a variety of sharp edges, flat planes, and subtle indentations, giving it a natural, weathered appearance. Its surface texture is coarse and uneven, with visible grain and some darker patches that suggest mineral variation. The coloration ranges from light tan to dark brown, with some areas appearing slightly mottled. The rock appears solid and dense, with no visible cavities or openings. Its overall form suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or barrier in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A medium, angular, brownish-gray rock with a rough, weathered surface and irregular shape. Its coarse texture and solid appearance make it suitable as a natural barrier or landscaping element.
description_view_0: This view shows a broad, slightly sloped face with a mix of lighter and darker brown tones and a prominent angular edge near the top.
description_view_1: This side reveals a flatter, more vertical face with sharper geometric facets and a darker shadowed area along the right edge.
description_view_2: The rock appears more compact and rounded from this angle, with a darker overall coloration and less pronounced surface features.
description_view_3: This view highlights a large, flat surface with visible grain and a subtle triangular indentation near the center.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
